System Modules

Nine Integrated Tools,
One Unified Platform

Compliance Dashboard
DENR & LLDA permits, ECC conditions, SMR logs, hazardous waste registry, stack emission & ambient air data.
Regulatory Tracking
Open ->
Analytics Center
See compliance trends, permit status, audit patterns, task pressure, and operational risks in one visual overview.
Executive View
Open ->
Regulatory Task Tracker
Track regulatory tasks, permit requirements, deadlines and priorities. Dashboard showing open, urgent, new and completed tasks.
MCS1-COM-REG-TASKS
Open ->
Plant Map & Pinning
Navigate the Bancal master plan, add emoji-style area pins, attach photos/PDFs, and link permits to exact locations.
Facility Mapping
Open ->
Daily Water Monitoring
Water station pH, DO, turbidity monitoring. Nutrient testing (ammonia, nitrate, phosphate). WWTP discharge quality.
MCS1-COM-F-4.12
Open ->
Environmental Audit
Comprehensive site checklist with scoring, findings, commitment dates, departmental assignments, and full PDF reports.
MCS1-COM-F-4.11
Open ->
OK
Closure Monitoring
Track audit findings through closure - KPI dashboard, overdue alerts, incident logging, and closure certificates.
Corrective Action Tracking
Open ->
Report Generator
Generate PowerPoint compliance reports from audit data. Add concern blocks, images, and custom table entries.
MCSSI Report Tool
Open ->
Compliance Finance
Manage environmental budget allocation, payment requests, file attachments, approvals, and spending comparisons.
Budget & Requests
Open ->

All Permits & Licenses

Complete master registry of all environmental, regulatory, and operating permits held by METS Cold Storage Services Inc. across all sites. Click any cell to edit.

Released Permits

Monitoring log of all permits and documents released to requesting parties. Records date, reference code, requested by, purpose, and receiver.

Stack Emission Testing

Periodic source emission test results - TSP, SO, NO parameters for boilers and generator sets. Click any value to edit or add new test records.

Limits: TSP 500 mg/NCM  |  SO 1,500 mg/NCM  |  NO 1,500 mg/NCM

Stack Emission Test Results - click any cell to edit

Export by Department

Download audit findings filtered to a specific department. Each export includes only the criteria assigned to that department.

Excel / SharePoint Sync

Exports a real .xlsx workbook of audit findings. For online sync, paste a Microsoft Graph upload URL and a Graph access token with file write permission. The token is kept for this browser session only.

Page Backgrounds
Set a background for each module. Uploaded images are compressed and each page gets a smart readability overlay based on its content density.
